title: 大阪杯の後に・それでも走れ

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Gold City's awesome! She always has the face of a
model, even when she's running so fiercely!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Seriously! She's the real deal, and she brings a touch of glamour to the race to boot. I hope she runs a lot in her senior year as well!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Screw this.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City!

As Gold City returns from her race, she sees her
manager waiting with a stern expression.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Hey, City. What was that today?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I've watched you in all your races, and never have
you looked so... unbeautiful.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Unbeautiful?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: I'm not talking about your results. I'm talking about you, City.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Before, you raced with such passion. I don't know
where that passion came from, but it was what
made you so eye-catching.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
That's why I allowed you so much flexibility with
work, and why I watched you run.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't get any of that today. You looked
empty.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Empty? You... might be right.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I do feel empty right now.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Then... why don't you consider calling it quits?
You've worked hard enough.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
As an adult, I can't just stand by and watch you
compete looking so unsightly.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I get that you don't want to be judged on looks
alone. But if you keep at it, one day it'll be your
name, your brand that earns respect.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Running isn't the only path there. You will be appreciated for who you are. So please...

Gold City is trying to catch her breath. I can't just
stand here and nod along.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?
choice_data_list: If she quits now, she's going to regret it.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry, but do you know what's making City
like this in the first place?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
It's you, forcing her to race without a second
thought.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
You're not respecting what she wants, you're just
pushing running on her.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
You don't realize the consequences City has to
suffer, the damage it could do to her life.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
If she keeps running like this, it's only going to
hurt her. Do you really think that's what's best for
her?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh, that's going a bit too fa—
choice_data_list:
But City still hasn't told me she actually wants
to quit.

text_block_list.text:
Even after failing to change her image, even as
she laments that there's no point anymore, she
still hasn't given up on running itself. That's why...
choice_data_list:
Until I hear those words come from her mouth,
I'm going to keep her racing.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: That right there is exactly what I'm talking about! Sigh... This is getting nowhere.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Look, how about this? Let her race one more
time, but if nothing changes after that...

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
You and her are finished. No more running. Is that
fine with you, City?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: ...Hate me if you want. See you at work.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well... that got heated.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Don't apologize. You're just... trying to do what's
best for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know, I'm not some little kid. She's always
looked out for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But... that's why I can't let things stand like this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Both of you are working so hard for me.
Meanwhile I've all but given up on myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't want someone else to decide my future.
Not you, not my manager... no one.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So I need to figure it out. What I really want to do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, my next race... It would be the spring Tenno
Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to figure it out by then. This...
whatever it is that I'm lacking—this emptiness.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
'Cause I don't want to end up hating you, or my
manager... or myself.
